title: MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mobile crisis response for mental health issues. Provides community-based response to deescalate and manage acute crises. Also offers follow-up care and coordination to ensure ongoing support. 2411 Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals in crisis Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-11pm, Saturday-Sunday 2pm-11pm (541) 682-1001 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 682-1001 Lane County Crisis Line INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call Lane County Crisis Line FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97401, 97402, 97403, 97404, 97405, 97408, 97409, 97412, 97413, 97419, 97424 (Lane County only), 97426, 97430, 97431, 97434, 97437, 97438, 97440, 97446 (Lane County only), 97448 (Lane County only), 97451, 97452, 97454, 97455, 97456 (Lane County only), 97461, 97463, 97475, 97477, 97478, 97487, 97488, 97489, 97490, 97492, and 97493 SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: In Person Crisis Intervention Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LANE COUNTY-WIDE CRISIS LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
